# nerdctl_system_prune (Action)

Removes unused data with `nerdctl system prune --force`. Destructive: it also removes objects not managed by Terraform (stopped containers, unused networks and images, and with `volumes`, unused volumes).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Destructive: removes unused objects even if they are not managed by
# Terraform (stopped containers, unused networks and images).
action "nerdctl_system_prune" "cleanup" {
  config {
    all     = true
    volumes = false
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `all` (Boolean) Remove all unused images, not just dangling ones.
- `volumes` (Boolean) Also prune unused volumes.
